column2: A remote site lacks terrestrial internet service. The application tolerates added latency, and the site has a clear view of the sky. Which connection type is the best fit?
column5:
Why

Satellite can reach locations without wired or terrestrial wireless infrastructure, but the long signal path adds latency.

Exam Trap

Availability can make satellite appropriate even when another medium would offer lower latency.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.18; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield Satellite ConnectionSelection Source::Messer-v170

column2: Which internet connection medium carries data as light and supports high data rates over long distances?
column5:
Real Help Desk

Fiber can have higher installation and equipment costs than copper, and optical links can be more difficult to repair.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.18; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield Fiber ConnectionSelection Source::Messer-v170

column2: An internet service carries broadband data over a cable-provider network using DOCSIS. Which connection type is this?
column5:
Exam Trap

DOCSIS identifies cable-data service. Current DOCSIS versions and provider speed tiers are not needed to recognize the connection type.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.18; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield Cable DOCSIS Source::Messer-v170

column2: Which broadband connection type uses telephone lines and commonly provides faster downloads than uploads?
column5:
Why

DSL performance depends partly on distance to provider equipment, so exact speeds vary by deployment.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.18; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield DSL ConnectionRecognition Source::Messer-v170

column2: A technician shares a phone's mobile-provider data connection with a laptop while traveling. Which internet connection type supplies the upstream service?
column5:
Exam Trap

The device-to-phone connection is local and separate from the phone's cellular upstream connection.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic Cellular Tethering Source::Messer-v170

column2: A rural property cannot obtain cable or fiber service. A provider can deliver terrestrial internet through an outdoor customer antenna. Which connection type is being offered?
column5:
Exam Trap

A WISP uses a terrestrial wireless link and commonly uses outdoor customer equipment. Satellite service instead communicates through a satellite.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield WISP ConnectionSelection Source::Messer-v170

column2: An organization has one network inside each office and another network that links its offices in different cities. How should these networks be classified?
column4: Each office network is a LAN; the network linking the offices is a WAN.
column5:
Why

LAN and WAN describe geographic scope. A WAN commonly interconnects LANs across substantial distance.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield LAN WAN Comparison Source::Messer-v170

column2: A phone, smartwatch, and wireless earbuds communicate over short-range links around one user. Which network type describes this scope?
column5:
Exam Trap

A PAN is defined by its personal, short-range scope. It does not identify the user's upstream internet connection.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield PAN NetworkScope Source::Messer-v170

column2: A network connects sites across one city and is larger than a building LAN but smaller in scope than a broad WAN. Which network type is it?
column5:
Memory Trick

“Metropolitan” is the scope cue: a MAN covers a city or metropolitan region.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic MAN NetworkScope Source::Messer-v170

column2: Several servers need high-bandwidth network access to shared storage that appears as block devices rather than ordinary shared files. Which network type fits this requirement?
column5:
Exam Trap

A SAN provides block-level storage access. A normal file share provides file-level access and is not automatically a SAN.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield SAN Storage NetworkRecognition Source::Messer-v170

column2: Which network type uses 802.11 to provide local connectivity and mobility within a building?
column5:
Exam Trap

A WLAN is the local wireless network. Its internet connection could separately use fiber, cable, DSL, cellular, satellite, or WISP service.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.19; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v2.0, Objective 2.7
column10: A+::220-1201::2.7 A+::220-1201::Domain2-Networking A+::220-1201::InternetConnectionandNetworkTypes Basic HighYield WLAN NetworkScope Source::Messer-v170
